assertions.evidence: '@type': 'Recipe' in JSON-LD with all required fields (name, image, recipeIngredient, recipeInstructions). Explicitly notes NOT to use BlogPosting.
app/sitemap.ts imports MetadataRoute from 'next'. File placed in app/ directory, generates /sitemap.xml automatically.
'export default async function sitemap(): Promise<MetadataRoute.Sitemap>' reads from getAllRecetas() and getAllCategorias() async calls.
Full app/recetas/[slug]/opengraph-image.tsx with ImageResponse from 'next/og'. Includes size exports, dynamic recipe data, background gradient, category badge.
